details.summary: Completed cartography of export/import sessions terrain across 4 packages
key_findings: No export/import feature exists — only remote share via opncd.ai
Dialog pattern is SolidJS + @opencode-ai/ui/dialog with lazy factory imports
IPC file dialogs: saveFilePicker, openFilePicker, openDirectoryPicker via Platform interface
SDK Session2 has fork/share/unshare methods — no export/import
Session data model: Effect Schema in opencode, localStorage via @solid-primitives/storage in app
Export path requires: new IPC handler + preload bridge + session serialization service + Dialog UI
Import path requires: file picker → parse → restore via SDK create
@zip.js/zip.js already in use for export-debug-logs — reuse for session export
i18n keys follow flat dot-separated pattern — no keys for export/import exist yet
Session sanitization needs ad-hoc solution — no centralized sanitizer exists

details.summary: Discovered 18 opencode session test files, 17 app session test files, 4 e2e session tests, and comprehensive fixture/mock system
key_gaps: No share integration test (mocked HTTP only)
Import test only covers URL parsing (54 lines)
